name: GitHub Copilot Chat
description: AI chat features powered by Copilot

store_metadata.name: GitHub Copilot Chat
store_metadata.short_description: AI chat features powered by Copilot

findings.detail: Activation event 'onStartupFinished': Runs every launch - immediate execution
Activation event 'onUri': Activates on custom URI scheme (can be triggered externally)
Contributes 'terminal': Can create and control integrated terminals (command execution risk)
Contributes 'debuggers': Can inspect running processes and variables (run arbitrary programs)
Contributes 'viewsContainers': Webview views - remote HTML/JS possible
Contributes 'walkthroughs': Can present guided flows to users

findings.name: Publisher-domain mismatch: github vs www.youtube.com
findings.description: Publisher "github" does not match operational domain "www.youtube.com"

findings.description: Publisher "github" does not match operational domain "vscodewalkthroughs.z1.web.core.windows.net"

findings.name: Publisher-domain mismatch: github vs twitter.com
findings.description: Publisher "github" does not match operational domain "twitter.com"

all_findings.name: Shell option via truthy coercion (shell: !0 or shell: 1)
all_findings.description: shell:true passed as truthy coercion (!0, 1) to evade literal detection

all_findings.description: Imports child_process module - shell command execution capability

signals.description: No access to credential files, SSH keys, or token stores
Extension activates only on specific events, not wildcard
